children.label: a
children.text: A course approved under and for the purposes of this chapter shall be deemed approved for the purposes of chapters 34 and 35 of this title.

children.label: b
children.text: Any course approved under chapter 33 of this title, prior to , under subchapter VII of chapter 35 of this title, prior to , and not disapproved under section 3483, section 1656 (as in effect prior to ), or , shall be deemed approved for the purposes of this chapter.February 1, 1965March 3, 1966February 1, 1965section 3679 of this title
